upgrade_source: Wikipedia (Church Avenue station BMT Brighton Line); MTA press release; Brooklyn Eagle
notes: Elevators on east side of E 18th St between Caton and Church Aves. Part of $965 million contract for 21 elevators across 8 stations awarded November 2022. Station bypassed during construction (southbound Aug-Nov 2024, northbound through Feb 2025). Elevators and new entrance opened November 10, 2025. Different from Church Av F/G (ID 356) and Church Av B/Q (ID 243).
